purpose: Define and enforce correct handling of lifetime bankroll, session baseline, session PnL, available cash, and capital committed. Every number displayed on the dashboard must be derived from a single authoritative source with no double-counting, no fake resets, and no history erasure. If the current accounting is already correct, this phase produces documentation proving it.

in_scope: dashboard_server.py — bankroll/session accounting variables, /api/state endpoint, how each number is computed
core/paper_exec.py — how realized PnL is recorded at close time, how committed_usd is tracked
out_of_scope: bot_core.py — do not touch in this phase
core/risk.py — do not touch in this phase
core/db.py — read-only if needed to understand DB queries, but do not modify
Do not redesign strategy or model logic

canonical_accounting_definitions.description: These are the authoritative definitions. The implementation must match them exactly.

lifetime_bankroll.definition: The real balance of the paper account — initial deposit plus all realized PnL since inception.
lifetime_bankroll.formula: lifetime_bankroll = INITIAL_BANKROLL + sum(pnl_usd for all closed trades since inception)
lifetime_bankroll.source: DB query: SELECT SUM(pnl_usd) FROM trades WHERE status='closed' — plus INITIAL_BANKROLL from env or config
lifetime_bankroll.must_not: Never reset. Never subtract losses to make the number look better. Never exclude old sessions.

capital_committed.definition: USD currently locked in open positions.
capital_committed.formula: capital_committed = sum(entry_px * qty for all open trades)
capital_committed.source: DB query: SELECT SUM(entry_px * qty) FROM trades WHERE status='open'
capital_committed.must_not: Do not use committed_usd from runtime state if DB is authoritative. Verify both agree.

available_cash.must_not: Do not include live_equity in available_cash — unrealized PnL is not spendable.

live_equity.definition: Current mark-to-market value of all open positions.
live_equity.formula: live_equity = sum(current_held_price * qty for all open trades)
live_equity.price_source: current_held_price = _held_bid(trade.side, ob) for each open trade — held-side only
live_equity.must_not: Do not use YES bid for a BUY_NO position. Do not use mid-price. Held-side bid only.

unrealized_pnl.definition: Total mark-to-market PnL on open positions.
unrealized_pnl.formula: unrealized_pnl = sum((current_held_price - entry_px) * qty for all open trades)
unrealized_pnl.must_not: Do not mix realized and unrealized into a single PnL number without labeling.

session_baseline.definition: The lifetime_bankroll at the moment the current bot session started (PID launched).
session_baseline.purpose: Lets operator see session-specific performance without corrupting lifetime history.
session_baseline.must_not: Do not fake a session reset by zeroing the DB. Session baseline is a snapshot, not a write.

session_pnl.definition: Realized PnL since session_baseline was recorded.
session_pnl.formula: session_pnl = sum(pnl_usd for closed trades WHERE ts_close >= session_start_ts)
session_pnl.must_not: Do not include trades from prior sessions.

accounting_invariants_to_enforce.description: A closed trade's PnL must appear in exactly one place: the cumulative realized PnL total. It must not also appear in live_equity or capital_committed.
accounting_invariants_to_enforce.verify: Confirm that fetch_open_trades() excludes status='closed' trades

accounting_invariants_to_enforce.description: If capital_committed exceeds lifetime_bankroll (paper account overcommitted), available_cash must be shown as 0, not negative — and a WARNING must be logged.
accounting_invariants_to_enforce.verify: Check for this guard in dashboard_server.py /api/state

accounting_invariants_to_enforce.description: live_equity uses _held_bid() or the equivalent held-side price — never raw yes_price/no_price from market data.
accounting_invariants_to_enforce.verify: Grep dashboard_server.py for any usage of yes_price, no_price, bid_yes, bid_no in equity calculations

accounting_invariants_to_enforce.description: session_baseline is recorded at process start and stored in runtime state or memory — never written to the DB in a way that erases prior trade history.
accounting_invariants_to_enforce.verify: Show where session_baseline is set and confirm it is not a DB write

accounting_invariants_to_enforce.description: The starting paper balance must come from an env var or config constant, not be hardcoded in dashboard logic.
accounting_invariants_to_enforce.verify: Show where INITIAL_BANKROLL (or equivalent) is defined and confirm dashboard_server reads it from there

result_must_include: accounting_definitions_verified: list of definitions confirmed correct
accounting_definitions_fixed: list of definitions that required fixes
verification: py_compile passes, git diff --name-only matches allowed_files
accounting_spec_must_include: Each canonical definition from above with: formula, source, current implementation status (VERIFIED/PARTIAL/FIXED)
A table of every number shown on the dashboard at localhost:8900 with its derivation
Any remaining gaps or inconsistencies after this phase

preflight_questions: Has RISK_PIPELINE_AUDIT_001 been approved and is RISK_PIPELINE_AUDIT_REPORT_001.md available?
What does the audit report say about bankroll/session accounting gaps?
What is INITIAL_BANKROLL currently set to in .env or config?
Does dashboard_server.py currently compute available_cash as lifetime_bankroll - capital_committed?
Is session_baseline stored in runtime/state.json or in memory? (Check the audit report.)
acceptance_criteria: All 5 accounting invariants above are confirmed or fixed
live_equity uses held-side bid price only
No fake session resets that corrupt lifetime history
Only files in allowed_files were changed
proof_of_work: Show git diff for each changed file
For each accounting definition, show the exact code line that computes it
For live_equity, grep output confirming no raw yes_price/no_price used in equity math
guardrails: Do not redesign strategy or model logic
Do not erase history to make accounting cleaner
Do not reintroduce ambiguous YES/NO economics
Held-side contract truth must remain the basis for pricing and exit logic
Do not widen scope to bot_core.py or core/risk.py
Use localhost:8900 as dashboard target for any manual verification
